title: Rebuilds possible HUGE NON SEQUITER
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild's (possible) HUGE NON SEQUITER             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sun Sep 13, 2009 8:51 pm So i was thinking about 2.0 after watching the camrip again. specifically Kaworu and Mari. Kaworu was an angel in the series. But what if he isn't in rebuild? what if its more false leads by the staff I mean Kaworu seems pretty angelic: -Naked on the moon at the end of 1.0 no trouble breathing -speaks very... prophet like -again out on the moon shirtless and talking -has the spear (possibly) your thoughts? it just seems to me like its way to obvious that Kaworu is an angel to the point i think its a trap...

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:52 pm Its not spelt Kaworu, its spelt Koala.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Sep 14, 2009 1:16 am Arg, I not be very consistent. Alex, I'll take "what the writers will once again lead us on about" for a thousand.

[]: Re: Rebuild's (possible) HUGE NON SEQUITER (SPoilArzzz)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Sep 14, 2009 2:52 am EvaCub wrote: your thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:47 pm ...that's pretty much all shit Angels like Kaworu do by default. What the hell suggests he might not be an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Mon Sep 14, 2009 7:21 pm What the hell suggests he might not be an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Sep 14, 2009 7:50 pm ITS A TRAP!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:45 pm Eva4Dummies wrote: What the hell suggests he might not be an Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:48 pm And a frigging hotty!
